title: Rare Dev & Governance Day 2025
description: Get ready to kick off Rare Evo 2025 with Rare Dev & Governance Day, a full day dedicated to builders, developers, and innovators in the blockchain space.

title: Blockchain Rio
description: Get ready to experience the ultimate immersion into the blockchain universe! Lectures by big names in the sector, high-level networking and unique experiences await you at Blockchain.Rio 2025.

title: TOKEN 2049
description: A major annual crypto conference that brings together founders, investors, developers, policymakers, and industry leaders to discuss trends, products, and innovations in the blockchain space.

title: Cardano Summit 2025
description: This November, the Cardano Summit arrives in Berlin, connecting the vibrant Cardano ecosystem with leading global enterprises.

title: IBW2025 Conference
description: India’s flagship web3 conference. Learn from global influential leaders, connect with like-minded peers, and shape the future of the web3 industry.

title: Azteca 2025 - Mexico Cardano Community Events
description: Azteca 2025 brought together 400+ Cardano enthusiasts across two days, with talks, panels, workshops, and community activities, showcasing Latin America’s growing role in Cardano.
organizer: Cardano Mexico and Latam Cardano Community

title: Berlin Hackathon 2025
description: Cardano Hackathon Berlin 2025, June 13 to 14, hosted by NMKR & Masumi at w3.hub, was a two-day mix of coding, collaboration & real talk, focused on building real tools for real users on Cardano.

title: Bangalore Tech Summit 2025
description: Asia’s largest technology event, featuring 1,200 exhibitors, over 100,000 attendees, keynote sessions, and the theme “Futurise.” Focus areas include AI, DeepTech, Biotech, SpaceTech. Designed for global entrepreneurs, startups, investors, and policymakers.
location: Bangalore International Exhibition Centre, Bengaluru, India

title: GITEX Africa Morocco 2026
description: Africa’s biggest tech event with 1400+ exhibitors from 130+ countries. Focus on AI, fintech, smart cities, cybersecurity, health tech, and digital transformation.

title: Blockchain Life Dubai 2025
description: One of the world’s largest Web3 and crypto forums, celebrating its 15th edition. 15,000+ participants, 200+ speakers, and a large expo zone for digital assets, mining, and blockchain leadership.

title: GITEX Global Dubai 2025
description: The world’s largest tech and startup event, 5000+ exhibitors from 170 countries. Key topics: AI, cloud, cybersecurity, IoT, and blockchain.

title: Tech4Impact Summit 2025
description: Event on technology for social and environmental impact. Attracts investors, startups, and purpose-driven organizations.

title: Philippines Blockchain Week 2025
description: Week-long event themed “Decoded,” emphasizing FinTech, Healthcare, Gaming, Music, and Filipino Web3 innovation. Includes international speakers and cultural experiences.

title: Cardano Tech Summit LATAM Buenos Aires
description: Get ready for an unforgettable Cardano Tech Summit in Buenos Aires! Hosted by Ada Solar, this event is a full day of inspiring talks, hands-on workshops, and networking with fellow Cardano enthusiasts. Pre-summit hackathons will take place at UBA. Whether you're a seasoned blockchain pro or just getting started, come and celebrate a vibrant community atmosphere.

title: Cardano Tech Summit LATAM Rio de Janeiro
description: The Cardano Tech Summit by Ada Solar, hosted at the iconic Museu do Amanhã, will feature keynote presentations from industry leaders, technical deep-dives, educational sessions, and discussions on finance, DeFi, and government regulation.Join this unparalleled opportunity for developers, entrepreneurs, and enthusiasts and explore how Cardano is transforming Latin America.
location: Museu do Amanhã, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil

title: Cardano Hackathon Asia
description: Cardano Hackathon Asia, hosted by EMURGO in Bangalore, is a two-day event focused on building and showcasing. Day one, the “Build Day,” is a hackathon that includes workshops, mentorship, and team collaboration.Day two, the “Showcase & Talks” day, will feature finalist demos, keynotes, panels, and awards, bringing together the best and brightest of the Indian blockchain community.

title: Cardano Africa Tech Summit Africa
description: Scheduled for February 2026 in Nairobi, Kenya, and hosted by WADA, Catalyst Africa Town Hall, Lido Nation and RemoStart, the Africa edition of the Cardano Summit will advance blockchain adoption and AI integration across the continent. With a sharp focus on real-world utility and community, the summit will serve as a convergence point for developers, startups, enterprises, and regulators. Pre-summit hackathons will also be held to cultivate use-case-driven development.
organizer: WADA, Catalyst Africa Town Hall, Lido Nation and RemoStart

title: Digital Assets Forum (London)
description: The Digital Assets Forum in London brings together policymakers, financial institutions, and innovators to discuss the integration of digital assets into global markets.

title: Consensus HK 2026
description: Consensus HK 2026 is the Asia edition of the global blockchain and Web3 conference, showcasing industry leaders, developers, and enterprises driving the digital asset economy.

title: Africa Tech Summit 2026
description: Africa Tech Summit Nairobi connects African tech leaders, investors, and startups across fintech, Web3, AI, and digital transformation sectors.

title: FutureProof Miami 2026
description: Future Proof Miami is a large-scale event for wealth management, fintech, and digital innovation, attracting global investors and technology providers.

title: DC Blockchain Summit
description: The DC Blockchain Summit is a policy-focused event in Washington DC that gathers regulators, industry leaders, and academics to shape the future of blockchain regulation and adoption.

title: TEAMZ Web3 & AI Summit
description: TEAMZ Web3 & AI Summit in Tokyo highlights innovations in blockchain, artificial intelligence, and Web3 applications, bringing together global experts and enterprises.

title: Paris Blockchain Week
description: Paris Blockchain Week is one of Europe’s largest blockchain conferences, uniting executives, entrepreneurs, and developers across digital assets, DeFi, and Web3.

title: TechEx Global
description: TechEx Global brings together enterprise leaders, IT decision-makers and technology innovators to explore the technologies shaping the future of business.

title: GITEX Dubai 2026
description: The flagship platform where finance, tech and regulation converge - exploring how payments, tokenisation, DeFi, Web3 & digital-assets reshape the global economy, while connecting banks, startups, regulators & investors to build the next-gen financial system.

title: Blockchain Life 2026
description: 17th International Forum on Web3, Cryptocurrencies and Mining.

title: Bengaluru Tech Summit
description: BTS 2026 will continue the mission to Futurise the world, shaping transformative opportunities across DeepTech, Digital Public Infrastructure, AI, SpaceTech, Semicon, Biotechnology, Mobility, FinTech, ClimateTech and beyond.

title: Crypto Expo Dubai
description: Crypto Expo Dubai is the essential event for anyone in the cryptocurrency and blockchain space. Recognized as a key gathering for industry leaders and enthusiasts, it’s the ultimate platform to explore, learn, and connect within the fast-paced world of crypto.

title: WebX
description: WebX is one of Asia’s largest global conferences planned and operated by CoinPost, Japan’s leading crypto asset and Web3 media platform.

title: Consensus Miami 2026
description: Consensus brings the largest crypto conference in the Americas to Miami’s electric epicenter of finance, technology, and culture.

title: Open Source Summit
description: Open Source Summit is the premier event for open source developers and contributors. It’s where maintainers, technologists, and community leaders come together to share knowledge, collaborate on solutions, and push open source projects forward. It’s the home for code, community, and the people driving the future of open source.
location: Minneapolis, Minnesota, United States of America

title: European Blockchain Convention
description: European Blockchain Convention brings together the people and companies shaping digital asset markets from exchanges, banks, asset managers and custodians to protocols, infrastructure providers, founders and policymakers.

title: Wealth Tech Executive Forum
description: The Wealth Tech Executive Forum: Zurich Edition is an invite-only executive series for senior leaders in asset and wealth management shaping the future of capital allocation, digital assets, and institutional infrastructure. On the 26th May 2026, in Park Hyatt Zürich, a select group of Switzerland’s leading institutional allocators and technology experts gather to discuss the latest innovations in asset and wealth management, how technology is reshaping the investment stack, and what it takes to stay ahead of the next wave of disruption.

title: Point Zero Forum
description: The Point Zero Forum is an initiative of the Global Finance & Technology Network (GFTN) and the Swiss State Secretariat for International Finance to promote a policy and technology dialogue in Financial Services. Held annually in Zurich, Switzerland, the Forum convenes central bankers, regulators, policymakers, and industry leaders to address the latest developments in financial technology and the future of finance.
organizer: Global Finance & Technology Network (GFTN) and the Swiss State Secretariat for International Finance

title: CV Summit 2026
description: CV Summit 2026 is bringing together top financial institutions, investors, and leaders in blockchain and AI in the heart of Switzerland’s financial and business hub.

title: Crypto Valley Conference
description: Since its inception in 2018, the Crypto Valley Conference continues to be a constant, meaningful and defining gathering place for the Swiss crypto and blockchain industry. We evolve alongside the ecosystem, staying true to our roots while embracing what’s next.

title: Rare Evo
description: The Cardano Foundation will be joining Rare Evo 2026 as a Featured Exhibitor in Las Vegas! Rare Evo, hosted by Rare Network, is where the blockchain industry shows up in person. The people building the technology, running the networks, and putting it to work in the real world, all together in one place. The conversations cover what's actually moving right now: tokenization, digital identity, stablecoins, governance, and regulation. Less whitepapers, more production. That's the part worth showing up for. We'll be on the floor throughout, and we hope to see you there. Get your complimentary ticket today: https://rareevo.io/
location: ARIA Resort & Casino, 3730 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89158
organizer: Rare Evo, hosted by Rare Network

title: Blockchain Rio 2026
description: The Institutional Gateway to LatAmʼs Web3 Ecosystem
